summary: REQ-12 is fully implemented. The Hero.tsx file has been updated with translucent frosted-glass styling on both the 'Contact Us Today' and 'Our Services' buttons. The 'Contact Us' button uses seafoam tint (bg-seafoam-400/25, hover:bg-seafoam-400/40) with backdrop-blur-md and a seafoam border. The 'Our Services' button uses white tint (bg-white/10, hover:bg-white/20) with backdrop-blur-md and a white border. Both buttons have hover states (hover:-translate-y-0.5, hover:border changes), legible white text, and the maritime color palette is preserved. No hallucinated features were found.
